title: Mapei India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Mapei India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Mapei India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Mapei India South Asia Partners:
Mapei India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India South Asia Partners!
